name: Brickwork
description: Running-bond bricks offset row by row, each course re-colouring on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 96%; height: 70%; margin: 15% 2%; border-radius: 6%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); } @match(y % 2 == 0) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -50%; top: 15%; width: 96%; height: 70%; border-radius: 6%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
